package.hashScope: RFC 8785 canonical JSON of the parsed package after removing the top-level packageSha256 digest field

identityVerification.packageIdentity: verified: RFC 8785 canonical JSON after removing the top-level packageSha256 digest field reproduces bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43
identityVerification.packageIdentitySafetyRule: Treat declaredPackageSha256 and verifiedByteSha256 as distinct mandatory checks and reproduce both before mutation.

selectionManifest.idDerivation: The namespace is the lowercase CLI-safe ticket abbreviation plus Design revision plus the first eight hex characters of the full declared package identity; requestId and identityInputs carry the full collision guard.
selectionManifest.canonicalContentHashRule: sha256 over RFC 8785 canonical JSON of the create object only

create.statement: Validate the server-owned ordered WorkflowDefinition and every StageDefinition, contract reference, harness reference, policy, and hash before use.
create.description: Ticket acceptance criterion 1; accepted Design coverage C1, C2, C24, C31.

create.statement: Register Questions, Research, Design, Structure, Plan, and Implementation in deterministic order; an explicitly disabled stage creates no run.
create.description: Ticket acceptance criterion 2; accepted Design coverage C3, C5, C15, C20-C23.

create.statement: Permit a built-in stage to be added through a contract and registration only, without a per-stage queue, worker, store family, Context tag, or central stage switch.
create.description: Ticket acceptance criterion 3; accepted Design coverage C3, C4, C10, C30, C44.

create.statement: Use stable semantic type names and represent versions only as data.
create.description: Ticket acceptance criterion 4; accepted Design coverage C1, C3, C6.

create.statement: Reject unknown, duplicate, unavailable, or incompatible versions before claim and retain versions referenced by active work across restart.
create.description: Ticket acceptance criterion 5; accepted Design coverage C2, C24, C29, C33-C36, C44.

create.statement: Provide bounded Schema-decoded exact accepted source input while preserving ticket authority and technical-artifact precedence.
create.description: Ticket acceptance criterion 6; accepted Design coverage C3, C7, C9, C44.

create.statement: Execute through the selected AgentHarness without giving the harness authority to advance StageRun or publish Git state.
create.description: Ticket acceptance criterion 7; accepted Design coverage C8, C10, C28.

create.statement: Publish signed exact-parent document artifacts with exact-old branch updates and authoritative duplicate or uncertain-effect recovery.
create.description: Ticket acceptance criterion 8; accepted Design coverage C11-C14, C29, C41.

create.statement: Release successors from accepted revisions only and prevent stale Generation, revision, session, review, handoff, publication, promotion, or reentry outcomes from advancing work.
create.description: Ticket acceptance criterion 9; accepted Design coverage C5-C7, C14-C17, C22-C25, C28-C29, C37.

create.statement: Create or update no pull request during QRSPI stage work.
create.description: Ticket acceptance criterion 10; accepted Design coverage C11, C16, C31, C44-C45.

create.statement: Prove registration, extension, skip, success, retry, restart, stale Generation, version recovery, uncertain publication, document revision, and implementation checkpoint handoff behavior.
create.description: Ticket acceptance criterion 11; accepted Design coverage C41-C44 and impact verification V1-V11.

create.title: Trusted definitions and catalog
create.position: Use server-owned hashed definitions, trusted versioned contracts and harnesses, one validator, and one erased catalog seam.
create.rationale: Reject unsafe, unknown, incompatible, or unavailable selections before claim without repository code execution or per-stage branches.
create.made-by: Design producer via accepted Design revision 4
create.input-summary: D1 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: Six exact typed stage contracts
create.position: Use six distinct typed contracts with bounded immutable authority-ordered source sets and persisted exact request hashes.
create.rationale: Preserve correct stage meaning, replay, and ticket authority.
create.made-by: Design producer via accepted Design revision 4
create.input-summary: D2 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: Durable tagged runtime model
create.position: Use strict tagged records and one generic operation lifecycle for leases, state, revision pointers, diagnostics, currentness, and restart.
create.rationale: Provide durable progression without stale or malformed advancement.
create.made-by: Design producer via accepted Design revision 4
create.input-summary: D3 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: Linear production and custody handoff
create.position: Use linear initialization, session checkpoints, attempt workspaces, result validation, atomic custody transfer, and cleanup fencing.
create.rationale: Keep agent execution safe and recoverable while denying the harness publication authority.
create.made-by: Design producer via accepted Design revision 4
create.input-summary: D4 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: Exact artifact publication
create.position: Verify exact scope, tree, and content; create one signed sole-parent commit; persist intent; update exact-old fast-forward-only; observe authoritatively.
create.rationale: Protect immutable canonical artifacts from duplicate or unauthorized Git effects.
create.made-by: Design producer via accepted Design revision 4
create.input-summary: D5 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: Publication-scoped reconciliation
create.position: Route publication conflicts, stale effects, rollback, and ambiguous observations to one durable read-only reconciliation with exact typed resolutions.
create.rationale: Reconcile external Git truth without stale parent advance or destructive mutation.
create.made-by: Design producer via accepted Design revision 4
create.input-summary: D6 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: Accepted-only progression
create.position: Use accepted-only linear progression, distinct document and implementation shapes, observed contiguous commits, monotonic replacement revisions, and no stage pull request.
create.rationale: Provide deterministic stage completion and checkpoint handoff.
create.made-by: Design producer via accepted Design revision 4
create.input-summary: D7 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: Mandatory owner handoffs
create.position: Validate required owner capabilities before exposure and persist exact idempotent local receipts that recover on the same identity.
create.rationale: Provide available duplicate-safe cross-owner delivery without taking owner lifecycles.
create.made-by: Design producer via accepted Design revision 4
create.input-summary: D8 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: Exact Design owner effects
create.position: Apply only exact typed owner results; require confirmed Provenance result and snapshot before Structure; accept reentry selection only from workflowd-vs3.14.
create.rationale: Preserve specialist ownership and prevent stale or incomplete Design advancement.
create.made-by: Design producer via accepted Design revision 4
create.input-summary: D9 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: Single runtime composition
create.position: Add one catalog, store, service, publisher, and loop; fail only QRSPI closed; retain local diagnostics without a status or readiness product.
create.rationale: Deploy the stage runtime without coupling unrelated service or taking operational-status ownership.
create.made-by: Design producer via accepted Design revision 4
create.input-summary: D10 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: Legacy migration and offline recovery
create.position: Preserve legacy rows, never infer facts, and require preflight manifest, verified backup, append-only apply or rollback, exact offline supersession, verification, then ordinary successor kickoff.
create.rationale: Upgrade safely from shipped but unexecutable legacy child rows.
create.made-by: Design producer via accepted Design revision 4
create.input-summary: D11 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: Lowest-boundary behavioral verification
create.position: Use real SQLite and Git plus fault injection to prove reconciliation, diagnostics, owner availability and recovery, upgrade recovery, and the full stage matrix.
create.rationale: Produce observable evidence at the lowest reliable boundaries.
create.made-by: Design producer via accepted Design revision 4
create.input-summary: D12 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: No aggregate capacity subsystem
create.position: Retain v1 audit records and nonterminal custody with individual bounds, but add no aggregate capacity policy, status, recovery, deletion, or invented owner.
create.rationale: Preserve audit and recovery semantics without adding work outside ticket authority; R9 remains accepted residual risk.
create.made-by: Design producer via accepted Design revision 4
create.input-summary: D13 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: workflowd-vs3.1 ownership boundary
create.position: workflowd-vs3.1 supplies the merged normative contract and owns no implementation lifecycle.
create.rationale: Accepted Design authority assignment.
create.input-summary: O1 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: workflowd-vs3.2 ownership boundary
create.position: workflowd-vs3.2 supplies reusable trusted harness and session mechanics, not StageRun, catalog, or publication ownership.
create.rationale: Accepted Design authority assignment.
create.input-summary: O2 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: workflowd-vs3.3 ownership boundary
create.position: workflowd-vs3.3 owns ticket ingress, branch establishment, WorkflowStart, Generation kickoff, and ordinary successor kickoff.
create.rationale: Accepted Design authority assignment.
create.input-summary: O3 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: workflowd-vs3.4 ownership boundary
create.position: workflowd-vs3.4 owns the catalog-aware linear runtime, StageRun and revisions, publication and reconciliation, local handoffs, Design state effects, deterministic promotion request, and next-stage release.
create.rationale: Accepted Design authority assignment; neighboring lifecycles remain excluded.
create.input-summary: O4 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: workflowd-vs3.5 ownership boundary
create.position: workflowd-vs3.5 owns review contributions, Design ownership and impact review, synthesis, budgets, and revision verdicts.
create.rationale: workflowd-vs3.4 supplies and consumes exact immutable handoffs only.
create.input-summary: O5 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: workflowd-vs3.6 ownership boundary
create.position: workflowd-vs3.6 owns durable gates, gate revisions, authenticated responses, Plannotator, and action delivery.
create.rationale: workflowd-vs3.4 applies only an exact typed response effect.
create.input-summary: O6 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: workflowd-vs3.7 ownership boundary
create.position: workflowd-vs3.7 owns session-link presentation and retention policy; session identity here is execution and currentness data only.
create.rationale: Accepted Design authority assignment.
create.input-summary: O7 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: workflowd-vs3.8 ownership boundary
create.position: workflowd-vs3.8 owns private artifact presentation; workflowd-vs3.4 creates immutable references but serves no content.
create.rationale: Accepted Design authority assignment.
create.input-summary: O8 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: workflowd-vs3.9 ownership boundary
create.position: workflowd-vs3.9 exclusively owns Provenance mutation, retry, authoritative observation, conflict handling, validation, and graph snapshots.
create.rationale: workflowd-vs3.4 builds one deterministic request and consumes one confirmed result.
create.input-summary: O9 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: workflowd-vs3.14 ownership boundary
create.position: workflowd-vs3.14 owns specialized Design route policy, sequencing, semantic classification, closure, affected-output selection, and reentry triggering.
create.rationale: workflowd-vs3.4 validates route outputs and applies exact local stage-state effects.
create.input-summary: O10 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: workflowd-3d8 ownership boundary
create.position: workflowd-3d8 owns operational-status aggregation, presentation, readiness, and safe retry workflow, but not capacity policy or QRSPI runtime lifecycles.
create.rationale: Accepted Design authority assignment.
create.input-summary: O11 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: Residual risk R1 disposition
create.position: NonMaterial under C1.
create.rationale: Fail-closed QRSPI configuration error only; C1 and V1 are mandatory conditions of this disposition.
create.input-summary: R1 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: Residual risk R2 disposition
create.position: NonMaterial under C2, C3, and C4.
create.rationale: Malformed data is blocked or replaced before canonical use; V2 and V3 remain mandatory.
create.input-summary: R2 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: Residual risk R3 disposition
create.position: NonMaterial under C3, C4, and C5.
create.rationale: Stale attempts remain audit and exact work recovers; V3 remains mandatory.
create.input-summary: R3 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: Residual risk R4 disposition
create.position: NonMaterial under C6, C7, and C8.
create.rationale: Exact-old and preflight failures do not advance; V4 remains mandatory.
create.input-summary: R4 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: Residual risk R5 disposition
create.position: NonMaterial under C7, C8, and C9.
create.rationale: An unresolved conflict can park one Generation but cannot erase external work or advance stale state; V4 and V5 remain mandatory.
create.input-summary: R5 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: Residual risk R6 disposition
create.position: NonMaterial under C10, C11, C12, and C13.
create.rationale: An owner outage can park one boundary while unrelated service continues; V6 and V7 remain mandatory.
create.input-summary: R6 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: Residual risk R7 disposition
create.position: NonMaterial under C4, C12, and C14.
create.rationale: Stale or mismatched owner results remain blocked; V11 remains mandatory.
create.input-summary: R7 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: Residual risk R8 disposition
create.position: NonMaterial under C15, C16, and C17.
create.rationale: A failed or unsupported upgrade preserves the prior database and blocks the affected workflow; V8 and V9 remain mandatory.
create.input-summary: R8 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43

create.title: Residual risk R9 accepted with follow-up
create.position: Accept the exact finite-volume cumulative SQLite and workspace exhaustion exposure for Design revision 4 without an aggregate capacity control.
create.rationale: Aggregate durable-storage capacity management is outside workflowd-vs3.4. Track prevention, detection, containment, and recovery separately in workflowd-8bg; C18 remains required and is not an aggregate-capacity control.
create.context: Human-selected option A; rating Significant (4) x AlmostCertain (5) = 20 / Critical for sustained unbounded use on a finite shared volume.
create.enforcement: Carry accepted residual risk, conditions, accountable human, and follow-up workflowd-8bg without rewriting the risk as resolved.
create.input-summary: R9 accepted from Design revision 4 package bac9e02e7016aa3135b5cd0913003b6fe10d2ed8ece8f9c39a695e6e3d13da43
create.made-by: Impact reviewer and synthesizer; final disposition by accountable human

create.name: Validate complete activation inputs
create.statement: Resolve and validate complete definitions, contracts, harnesses, policies, availability, hashes, paths, bounds, and retained active versions at every activation and restart boundary; fail QRSPI closed before claim with exact error.

create.name: Bound exact semantic inputs
create.statement: Decode and bound exact immutable source, request, and result bytes at the selected contract, preserve authority order, and reject hash, duplicate, or path mismatch before persistence or publication.

create.name: Fence harness execution
create.statement: Keep the trusted harness limited to task and session work; persist launch before create and session before prompt; bind attempt workspace and output to exact lease and session identity.

create.name: Guard every transition
create.statement: Guard every durable transition and external intent by exact Generation, run, revision, operation, attempt, session, and handoff identities; quarantine data errors and preserve stale audit.

create.name: Fence cleanup and custody
create.statement: Fence cleanup and workspace custody; permit no replacement while cleanup is unconfirmed and no deletion while publication or effect is nonterminal or uncertain.

create.name: Verify exact publication candidate
create.statement: Verify custody, scope, diff, path, content, parent, signature and trailers, and one final SHA, then use exact-old fast-forward-only mutation.

create.name: Observe publication authoritatively
create.statement: Persist intent before mutation and authoritatively observe remote ref, parent, signature, trailers, attribution, blob, and content before completion; observe an unknown effect before retry.

create.name: Reconcile without destructive mutation
create.statement: Atomically create one publication-scoped TargetReconcile, save parent state, make publication unclaimable, and permit only read-only observation and exact typed resolution.

create.name: Retain reconciliation evidence
create.statement: Retain complete directly queryable reconciliation identity, observations, error, allowed actions, and terminal resolution exactly once across restart.

create.name: Validate mandatory owner capabilities
create.statement: Derive mandatory owner references and validate registrations and availability before ingress, each activation, and new effects while unrelated service remains available.

create.name: Recover the same handoff
create.statement: Persist exact handoff diagnostics and observe or resubmit the same deterministic local receipt after failure, restart, and restoration; duplicates return the same result and mismatches remain blocked.

create.name: Accept exact owner results only
create.statement: Accept only exact typed owner results bound to current scope, package, policy, and request; approval alone and partial or uncertain results cannot release Structure.

create.name: Require owner-side exact lifecycle
create.statement: The selected named downstream owner must implement an idempotent owner-side lifecycle and exact result production behind the registered capability before its path is exposed.

create.name: Pin Design and reentry identities
create.statement: Pin all Design, promotion, and Structure identities; require the exact workflowd-vs3.9 result and snapshot for release; accept bounded workflowd-vs3.14 reentry and apply only named local effects idempotently.

create.name: Classify legacy state before writes
create.statement: Before normal startup writes, take a read-only snapshot and classify every current Generation and nonterminal operation into a canonical bounded manifest with exact diagnostics and actions.

create.name: Back up and apply append-only
create.statement: Verify unchanged manifest and database, fsync and verify same-filesystem database, WAL, and SHM backup, apply append-only schema transactionally, and prove rollback or restore and verify backup.

create.name: Supersede exact no-effect legacy work
create.statement: Resolve only exact no-effect legacy Generation through idempotent offline supersession, verify the result, and use ordinary authenticated WorkflowStart for the successor.

create.name: Bound individual items without capacity claim
create.statement: Enforce every configured and global payload and diff bound and release only workspace custody proven terminal or superseded; do not represent these as aggregate-capacity control.

create.name: Verify activation validation
create.statement: Prove complete config, catalog, and handoff validation prevents claim at the Layer and activation boundary.

create.name: Verify exact bounded data
create.statement: Prove exact source and result Schemas, hashes, bounds, order, and authority survive persistence and retry.

create.name: Verify attempt and custody fencing
create.statement: Prove session and workspace output transfer custody only under the exact current attempt and cleanup fence.

create.name: Verify exact Git reconciliation
create.statement: Prove publication and reconciliation preserve exact Git truth across every mutation, transaction, and restart window.

create.name: Verify direct reconciliation recovery
create.statement: Prove reconciliation remains directly recoverable without a status product.

create.name: Verify capability availability
create.statement: Prove mandatory owner capability exists before any configured crossing can create an effect.

create.name: Verify same-handoff recovery
create.statement: Prove an unavailable owner crossing recovers through one exact handoff and owner lifecycle.

create.name: Verify upgrade safety
create.statement: Prove upgrade classifies before writes, never converts or invents legacy state, and restores or proves the prior database on failure.

create.name: Verify exact legacy retirement
create.statement: Prove shipped recovery retires only exact dormant legacy work and creates a successor only through ordinary ingress.

create.name: Verify individual bounds without capacity claim
create.statement: Prove individual bounds and custody rules work while making no aggregate-capacity guarantee.

create.name: Verify exact Design progression identities
create.statement: Prove only exact current package, response, promotion, snapshot, and directive identities can alter Design progression or reentry.

orderedAlgorithm: Materialize the 220 explicitly selected semantic edges from revision 1: 110 source-to-requirement references edges, 33 requirement-to-resolution needs edges, and 77 resolution-to-rule produces edges.

For each resolution intent in manifest order, account for the CLI edge deterministically generated by create.requirement-id: one resolves edge from that resolution id to its requirement id (33 total).

For each rule intent in manifest order, account for the CLI edge deterministically generated by create.requirement-id: one produces edge from that requirement id to the rule id (29 total). The create.resolution-id edge is already among the 77 selected resolution-to-rule produces edges.
Sort the complete set by the ordinal tuple (scope, type, from-type, from-id, to-type, to-id).
edgeGeneration.materializationRequirement: edgeIntents is the fully materialized, authoritative 282-edge selection and must equal the authoritative observed export by edge key; the algorithm is retained only as an audit check.
edgeGeneration.cliGeneratedEdgeDisclosure: The supported resolution create --requirement-id and rule create --requirement-id options automatically materialize edges. Those 62 edges are explicit selection intents here; they are not hidden side effects.

exclusions.reason: Git remains canonical; Provenance receives immutable source references and selected attributable meaning only.
Transcripts are not approved semantic authority and are outside Provenance ownership.
Workflowd owns operational state; it does not authorize implementation meaning.
Sessions support runtime attribution but are operational state; source references preserve role attribution without copying session state.
These items provide context or evidence but do not independently authorize work; selected requirements, resolutions, controls, and verification rules retain their attributable semantic effect.
Accepted ownership boundaries assign these elsewhere or exclude them; R9 follow-up is referenced as workflowd-8bg rather than promoted as current-ticket implementation authority.

selectionCompleteness.invariant: No implementation-bearing requirement, accepted decision, ownership assignment, control, verification obligation, residual-risk disposition, or deterministically materialized CLI edge is excluded.

requestedGraphRoot.requiredIncludedRecordIds: all create.id values in the four ordered intent arrays
requestedGraphRoot.requiredIncludedEdges: all 282 ordered edgeIntents, with exact edge-key equality to the authoritative observation, including the 33 resolves edges generated by resolution requirement-id and the 29 requirement-to-rule produces edges generated by rule requirement-id

snapshotRequirement.mustBeProducedBy: workflowd-vs3.9 after authoritative observation and complete graph validation
mustBind: declared package identity and verified package bytes
exact included semantic record identities and versions
all 282 exact included edge identities corresponding to the ordered edgeIntents
snapshotRequirement.immutability: The snapshot reference must identify an immutable, authoritatively observed graph version; a mutable current graph head is insufficient.
snapshotRequirement.genericExportIsInsufficient: The verified generic export proves the currently observed 83-record, 282-edge scope state but exposes no immutable snapshot/version identity, authoritative creation receipt, or command that binds the export to this revision-2 request and acceptance scope; it therefore does not satisfy the snapshot requirement.
snapshotRequirement.releaseCondition: Revision 1 is incomplete and cannot release Structure. Revision 2 also cannot release Structure until a matching ProvenancePromotionResult adopts the existing identical records and edges, proves complete authoritative observation of all 282 edge intents, and supplies the required immutable snapshot reference.

cliCapabilityAssessment.unsupportedSnapshotCapability: The installed CLI has generic export but no immutable graph snapshot command or snapshot identity schema.
cliCapabilityAssessment.schemaCorrection: resolution approved-at uses Unix epoch milliseconds; input-type, input-reference, and input-summary are emitted together for all 33 resolution intents

automaticEdgeBehavior.resolutionRequirementId: resolutions create --requirement-id deterministically generated one resolves edge from each resolution to its requirement (33 observed)
automaticEdgeBehavior.ruleRequirementId: rules create --requirement-id deterministically generated one produces edge from each requirement to its rule (29 observed)
automaticEdgeBehavior.ruleResolutionId: rules create --resolution-id generated the selected resolution-to-rule produces edge already present in revision 1
automaticEdgeBehavior.disclosure: Revision 2 explicitly includes every observed automatic edge and does not treat automatic CLI behavior as absent or incidental.

cliCapabilityAssessment.mutationCommandsRunMeaning: No mutation command was or may be run while preparing revision 2; the predecessor promotion already created the identical observed records and edges.

predecessorRequest.releaseEffect: Revision 1 did not enumerate 62 deterministic CLI-generated edges, so it is not a complete promotion request and cannot release Structure.

adoption.statement: Revision 2 adopts only the existing identical deterministic 83 records and 282 edges after authoritative observation; it requests no new, changed, or deleted Provenance state.
